name: meridian
description: Markdown-first Paper Wiki and Lab research-coding copilot for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use Paper Wiki and Lab research-coding workflows.
interface.longDescription: Meridian provides Paper Wiki workflows for paper ingestion, retrieval, synthesis, and user insights, plus Lab workflows for wiki-grounded experiment design and debugging.
defaultPrompt: Ingest this paper into my Paper Wiki.
Use my Paper Wiki to answer this research question.
Use Lab to plan the next experiment.
